name: Kogake
description: These coverings for the hands and feet allow devastating high flying hand-to-hand combat attacks without risking harm to the user.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: These coverings for the hands and feet allow devastating high flying hand-to-hand combat attacks without risking harm to the user.

components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Morphics

An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

components.name: Rubedo

A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.3
patchlogs.changes:
Kogake Prime
Kogake Prime
Banshee Prime, Mirage Prime, Euphona Prime, Kogake Prime, Akbolto Prime, Helios Prime, and Deconstructor Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Rhino Prime & Nyx Prime, Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Prime Vault 29.5.9
patchlogs.changes: Banshee Prime, Mirage Prime, Euphona Prime, Kogake Prime, Akbolto Prime, Helios Prime, and Deconstructor Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables!

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a residual issue that affected exactly 29 accounts as a result of the Kogake Riven fix in Hotfix 25.0.2.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.2 + 25.0.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Kogake Weapon missing from progression for a lot of Tenno. Mastery has been restored and peace brought back to the universe!
Fixed Kogake Rivens appearing as ‘Croniton’.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
The Kogake Weapon has vanished from progression for a lot of Tenno. We are aware and working on a fix. Rest assured it will be restored. 
Rivens appearing as ‘Croniton’ are broken Kogake Rivens.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some positioning of weapon trails on sparring weapons (Obex, Kogake, Hirudo, etc).

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4.2 + 19.4.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed positioning of the Kogake and Obex to be symmetrical.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.5 + 16.4.5.1 + 16.4.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed positioning of melee decorations on the Obex and Kogake.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Kogake’s slide attack sweeping from the left hand instead of the left foot.  Also adjusted the timing to better match the animation.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Kogake charge attack from damaging Sentinels.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.2: Tenno Reinforcement
patchlogs.changes: Love the Kogake? Join our Kogake Kills contest! The 5 Best Kogake Kills win 1000 Platinum: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/70878-kogake-kills-contest/
